no-restricted-syntax.message: Use swrFetcher from @/lib/api instead of defining local fetcher
Use useFilteredSWR from @/lib/hooks/use-filtered-swr instead of useSWR directly. Exemptions: use-filtered-swr.ts, use-compare-data.ts, config-store.ts
Hardcoded hex color in Tailwind className: use semantic token class (e.g. bg-[var(--color-danger)]) or semantic CSS class instead
Hardcoded hex color in Tailwind className: use semantic token class (e.g. text-[var(--text-primary)]) or semantic CSS class instead
Hardcoded hex color in Tailwind className: use semantic token class or CSS variable instead
